name: Beef and Onion Deep Dish Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 Pouch frozen sweet peas with butter sauce, (10 oz.)
1 frozen prerolled puff pastry sheet, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Place the unopened pea pouch in warm water for 10 to 15 minutes to thaw.
3. In a large skillet, brown ground beef with onion and garlic over medium heat until no longer pink. Drain excess fat.
4. Stir in sour cream, flour, thyme, and pepper until well combined.
5. Add the thawed peas to the mixture and stir to combine.
6. Pour the mixture into a 1 1/2 quart shallow casserole dish.
7. Cut the puff pastry sheet to fit inside the top of the casserole dish.
8. Place the pastry on top of the ground beef mixture, gently pressing it down to cover evenly.
9. Brush the edges of the pastry with beaten egg to help it brown during baking.
10. Prick the pastry in several places with a fork to allow steam to escape during baking.
11. Bake at 400 degrees for 25 to 35 minutes or until golden brown and set.
